title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a valid OrangeHRM account | Browser is open and pointed at the login URL
test_steps: Navigate to the OrangeHRM login page | Enter valid username: Admin | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard. URL contains /dashboard. User name is visible in the top navigation bar.

title: Verify failed login with invalid username
preconditions: User has a valid OrangeHRM account | Browser is open and pointed at the login URL
test_steps: Navigate to the OrangeHRM login page | Enter invalid username: invaliduser | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: Login attempt is unsuccessful. Error message is displayed indicating invalid username or password.

title: Verify failed login with invalid password
preconditions: User has a valid OrangeHRM account | Browser is open and pointed at the login URL
test_steps: Navigate to the OrangeHRM login page | Enter valid username: Admin | Enter invalid password: wrongpassword | Click the Login button
expected_result: Login attempt is unsuccessful. Error message is displayed indicating invalid username or password.
